io.github.squid233.squidcraft.api

类 ItemRegisters

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.github.squid233.squidcraft.api.ItemRegisters

  • public class ItemRegisters
extends java.lang.Object
    items register api → (item, tool and armor) register.

      所有方法 静态方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static net.minecraft.item.Item register(java.lang.String modid, java.lang.String name, net.minecraft.item.Item item)
      The register method You can use this method just like this below: public static final Item EXAMPLE_ITEM = register("modid", "example", new Item(new Item.Settings()); After register, log4j will be remind you: "register modid:example success!"
      static void registerAll(java.lang.String modid, Item... items) 
      static net.minecraft.item.Item registerAxe(java.lang.String modid, java.lang.String name, net.minecraft.item.Item item)

    • 构造器详细资料

      • ItemRegisters

        public ItemRegisters()

    • 方法详细资料

      • register

        public static net.minecraft.item.Item register(java.lang.String modid,
                                               java.lang.String name,
                                               net.minecraft.item.Item item)

        The register method

        You can use this method just like this below:

        public static final Item EXAMPLE_ITEM = register("modid", "example", new Item(new Item.Settings());

        After register, log4j will be remind you: "register modid:example success!"

        参数:
        modid - Mod identifier.
        name - Item registry name.
        item - Item.
        返回:
        Register item.

      • registerHelmet

        public static net.minecraft.item.Item registerHelmet(java.lang.String modid,
                                                     java.lang.String name,
                                                     net.minecraft.item.Item item)
        参数:
        modid - Mod identifier.
        name - Helmet prefix.
        item - Helmet item.
        返回:
        Register item.
